title: Microwave quantum logic gates for trapped ions

rights.discriminant_action: Tier C summary does not host article text or figures, so hosting is not gated by the publisher audit. Full audit of Nature author self-archiving terms (pre-Nature-Portfolio era, 2011 imprint) deferred to annual audit or to any future tier-promotion review; if promotion to Tier B is ever contemplated, this field must be resolved first.

audit.auditor_note: Tier C summary-first per Phase 1. Paper is from the NIST era under the Ospelkaus/Leibfried collaboration. Exact publication day recorded (Nature 476, online 2011-08-11).
